reviews.review_description: I love how cute this game is and the reason I play it is im allergic to cats in real life, but I love cats, so instead of swelling up when I get a real cat, mind as well just get virtual cats I can play with. The only problem I have is that fish take too long to get. 4 Stars

reviews.review_title: OMG MY CAT IS IN THIS:DDDDD (not rly)
reviews.review_description: I have black cat luna with yellow eyes, there i sall in the bush A BLACK CAT WITH YELLOW EYES:DDDDD!!!!!Besides the point, rly good game, there's only one glich... Its not rly a problem tho, the cats don't come to you when u snap ur fingers...its still rly good tho, im playing on buying inu atsume VR...!!!!!!!!:33333√

This game is great for the price.
The tutorial doesn't explain hand tracking but there is an another tutorial in settings. The hand tracking is simple, the game for me is easier with hand tracking. The game includes a large amount of cats and MR (mixed reality.) It doesn't take much storage to downoad. Any one is able to play. I Recommend a cat lover for this game. The bad things about this are. That this game has poorly built things such as the sky and non detailed things that should get more detail. Hand tracking can be difficult to use such as the camera shortcut, clapping for the cats attention or  pointing to the destination you want. There is 3 locations to teleport to which I think it should be more.

As a person who has allergie to cats (and actually more) this is the only way for me to spend time with cats right now. I also like the MR feature but it's a little bit row, i hope it will get better in the future!
Also, I'd really like to see mini games here, for example teaching your cat tricks or other stuff like that.
To sum up, i love this game and i hope it will get more interesting and fun features later, buy it if you love cats.

reviews.review_title: Cute!! But I want more content/changes
reviews.review_description:
This game is adorable and a perfect VR port of the mobile game. I'm especially impressed about the mixed reality room feature!

Though I'm kind of disappointed in the lack of decor items. For example, I would love it if picture frames could hold the photos you take from the cat photo albums! It would liven my MR room so it wouldn't feel so empty.

There's so many different goodies in the game. Why am I restricted to only placing them in certain locations? I want to be able to place more goodies anywhere I'd like! (And please let me place more than one goodie in my mixed reality room)

But my one main criticism is the lack of interactivity. This version of the game needs to take advantage of the VR platform. What do I mean? First of all, stop relying on the tablet menu to do everything. I want the option to physically carry the cat food to fill up the bowl. I want to hold a Polaroid camera and physically place the photos I take in the photo album. I want more things to do!

If you add all of my suggestions and implement microtransactions, I'll be so happy! I would further support this game by purchasing more fish currency so I can freely decorate my MR room the way I'd like to

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review! We're delighted that you're enjoying the world of Neko Atsume. 
We will use your feedback to help us create a better game! We will continue to add new cats and enhance the game features through free updates, so please stay tuned.

It worked for a little bit today but now every time I try to go into the game, I get stuck on the meow loading screen as the white scenery starts to lag a whole bunch, including the loading screen itself as it stays stuck on the loading screen, just lagging and I really hope I’m not the only one who has this issue because I have no idea how to fix it

reviews.review_title: this is what vr was meant for
reviews.review_description:
as a person who loves cats, it breaks my heart knowing i’ll probably never get to own one because i’m deathly allergic to them. this game not only eases the pain of not being able to have a cat, but also captures the image of what owning the perfect cat would feel like.

this is by far the most adorable game i’ve ever played, and for something so small, has a surprising amount of content packed into it. despite the come-and-go nature of the cats in this game, you still get to enjoy the simple and satisfying pleasures of petting, picking up, and playing with your cat. you also get to take photographs to store in each one’s little album. and there are so many different breeds and items that despite this game’s simplicity, it’s hard to get bored while playing it.

in addition to that, this game’s charming and adorable art style makes this experience even more enjoyable. i cannot tell you how many times i broke out into baby talk just petting and lifting up these little creatures while watching them paw at toys waving in front of them.

in conclusion, this game is a complete and total serotonin generator, and is worth the price tag, tenfold. the devs did an amazing job with this game.

don’t think. just buy it. you won’t regret it.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review! The kitten's gestures and movements were areas we paid special attention to, so I'm glad to hear that you like them.
We're truly happy that by creating this game, we were able to provide you with a life with cats.

We will continue to add new cats and enhance the game features through free updates, so please stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: I am completely captivated by the enchanting world of of this game, ESPECIALLY in virtual reality! The vibrant colors that burst forth from the screen are absolutely mesmerizing, immersing me in a visually stunning experience. Every shade and hue is so vivid and lively, creating a delightful atmosphere that feels like a dream come true.  Moreover, the sounds in this game are simply extraordinary. From the gentle purring of the adorable feline companions to the playful meows that fill the air, every audio detail is meticulously crafted to perfection. The soundtrack is a symphony of joy, with cheerful melodies that uplift my spirits and make me feel like I'm in a whimsical wonderland. But it's not just the visuals and sounds that make this game so irresistible; it's the meticulous attention to detail in every aspect. The virtual world is meticulously designed, with every nook and cranny thoughtfully crafted to create a cozy and inviting environment. The attention to detail is astounding, from the intricately designed furniture and toys to the delicate animations that bring the kitties to life.  Every interaction with the virtual kitties is a delight. From placing toys and treats to watching the kitties play and interact with each other, every moment is filled with joy and wonder. The developers have truly captured the essence of these adorable creatures, and it's impossible not to be enchanted by their playful antics and endearing personalities. In this game,  everything comes together in perfect harmony, creating an experience that is nothing short of purrfect. The vibrant colors, mesmerizing sounds, and meticulous attention to detail transport me to a world where happiness and cuteness reign supreme. It's a game that brings a smile to my face and fills my heart with warmth, making it an obsession that I simply can't get enough of!!!!!!!

The VR version is just like the old phone game, except the cats move around, and you can pet them and pick them up. The turning can be changed from smooth (a little barfy) to set degree turning! Super nice. Just be sure to check your settings. Is it completely worth the $20 price tag? Not for me. Am i going to refund it? Nah, it's still cute, and i think I'll continue to try to collect those cats. It might've been nice to have more silver and gold fish for the price, but i guess it's fine. The Mixed Reality is pretty cute- your furniture fits right in with the game's theme. Overall, three stars.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We're delighted that you're enjoying the world of Neko Atsume. We will continue to add new Goodies and enhance the game features through free updates, so please stay tuned.

reviews.review_title: Cute, but not a lot to do
reviews.review_description:
I don't feel like this game is worth $20 considering the content you get.
Right now you can only pet, pick up, and wave a toy around the cats, as well as take pictures of them.
There is no free movement. There are only three set spots where you can teleport to.
Clapping or snapping your fingers to lure the cats, feel unresponsive and often only brings the same cat over every time.
And lastly I want to say that I couldn't find any tutorial on the hand tracking, and just had to figure it out myself.

Tl:dr
The game doesn't give you that much freedom, and the things you can do are lacking.
Would give a higher rating if it was $10.

developer_response.body:
We are sorry to hear that you were not satisfied with the content. Your valuable feedback will be taken into consideration for future development.
Snap turns and free movement will be addressed soon, so please wait for the next update. We will continue to add new Goodies and enhance the game features through free updates, so please stay tuned.

reviews.review_title: Worst game ever due to the tutorial
reviews.review_description: I got this for me. I have hand tracking but I had them struggle with the tutorial. I'm in the tutorial and I see this try using both hands to call up the camera. How do I do this? I see my hands from the oculus headset, but not for the hands from your game.

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear that you're having difficulty playing comfortably. We'll pass your feedback along to the development team.

To invoke the shooting function with hand tracking, you need to perform the "Finger frame" gesture using both hands, as shown in the diagram displayed during the tutorial.
Additionally, during hand tracking mode, white hand models are not displayed; instead, gray hands are shown.

If the above gestures do not activate the shooting function, please contact us at 'support-cat@hit-point.co.jp' with detailed information. We will be happy to assist you more directly.

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear that you're having difficulty playing comfortably. We'll pass your feedback along to the development team.
If you cannot play MR mode properly, please try the following. These may fix the problem.

・Redesignate room settings and boundaries.
・Allow permission for access to spatial data to be granted.
・Reboot the HMD.
・Please switch to MR mode from the tablet's Settings. Alternatively, transition to MR mode through the door at the back of the room.

If you continue to be unable to do so, please contact us at 'support-cat@hit-point.co.jp' with detailed information. We will respond to you more directly.

reviews.review_description:
This is the best game ever and it isn't even close. When I first came across the game in the shop I was already convinced to buy it, so I did as soon as I could. This was one of the best decisions I have ever made.
I've played the original game since I was about 10 years old, so the game really has a place in my heart. As I was looking for games for my Quest 3 I had recently gotten as a Christmas gift, I came across this. As a huge cat lover who is unable to own a real cat, the video and the images for this game took my heart away, and since I had played this game for a long time and loved it the concept of having the same game but in VR AND being able to interact with the cats is what made me buy it. And I don't regret a single thing.
This game is perfection. Everything about it is amazing and works perfectly. The cats are stinking adorable and the MR mode works flawlessly and is exactly what I had expected to be (but I want more kitties in my room :((( ).
If you've played the original Neko Atsume and liked that, you'll definitely love this. It gives you almost (the game is still new!) all of the features of the original, but in VR. The best part of the game, and what really made me buy it as soon as possible, is that you can interact with the cats. You can pet them, pick them up and play with them. You can PLAY WITH THEM. And trust me, the cuteness will melt your heart the second they come up to you. Just clap your hands and you'll attract a cat who wants to be touched, and the cat will start following you. Even little details like the way they walk/run are adorable. Another detail I love is that when you pet the cats or pick them up, your controllers vibrate to signify purring.
If you love cats or just cute things in general I 100% recommend this game. I would rate it more than 5 stars if I could; I'm certain that buying this game has greatly improved my mental health and I don't regret a single thing. It may currently be my third favorite thing in the world as of right now. 

TL;DR: cat cute. highly recommend.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the messages filled with lots of love! The entire development team is delighted that you've enjoyed playing "Neko Atsume Purrfect."
 We will continue to work towards enhancing the game experience by adding new goodies and improving game features through free updates, so please stay tuned for more. We appreciate your ongoing support for "Neko Atsume."

Cute cat game

reviews.review_title: An uncomplicated, fun game about cats
reviews.review_description: Even though the game revolves around waiting and getting gifts, it’s far from boring. You can interact with the cats in ways such as petting them, holding them, even playing with them. The mixed reality mode makes it even better, you can play the game like you normally would, except your walls are the border, and you can see what’s going on around you. I would definitely recommend this game to anyone seeking a simple, relaxing experience.
